scripts.title: Moderna's Big Boost
scripts.hook: Moderna surged over 10 percent today, catching Jim Cramer's eye.

beats.vo: Moderna shares were up about 10 percent, after Jim Cramer expressed his liking for the stock, advising investors on market rotation.
beats.caption: Moderna +10%

beats.vo: Cramer specifically highlighted Moderna's significant gains this year, seeing opportunity in the current market shift.
beats.caption: Cramer Likes MRNA

beats.vo: This positive sentiment comes as the market heads into its final week before second-quarter earnings reports.
beats.caption: Ahead of Q2 Earnings

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna took center stage today after a big jump! Find out why Jim Cramer is talking about it and what's next for the biotech giant. #Moderna #StockMarket #JimCramer #MarketNews

scripts.title: Tech Mixed, Apple Gains
scripts.hook: Tech stocks saw big swings today, with Apple making headlines.

beats.vo: Apple shares climbed nearly 5 percent, following news of its plans for a major iPhone lineup expansion, including its first foldable model.
beats.caption: Apple +5% on Foldable iPhone

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Netflix also rose almost 5 percent. The streaming giant highlighted its asset-light business model, generating strong cash flow compared to competitors.
beats.caption: Netflix +5% Strong Cash Flow

beats.vo: On the downside, Tesla dropped over 7 percent. This came after Barclays reiterated an Equalweight rating on the stock, citing cautious outlook concerns.
beats.caption: Tesla -7% on Cautious Outlook

beats.vo: And Arm Holdings fell about 6 and a half percent, continuing its pullback after reaching peak levels earlier this year.
beats.caption: Arm Holdings -6.5% Pullback

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: A mixed day for tech! Apple and Netflix saw gains, while Tesla and Arm Holdings pulled back. We break down the key movers and shakers. #StockMarket #TechStocks #Apple #Netflix #Tesla #ArmHoldings
